title: Agent Card
description: Well-known agent identity and capability declaration. Every EndogenAI module exposes an agent-card.json at /.well-known/agent-card.json that conforms to this schema. Derives shape endogenously from all 14 modules in modules/.

description.description: Human-readable description of this module's purpose, cognitive role, and neuroanatomical analogue.

capabilities.description: Module capability declaration. Groups I–III use an array of capability labels (e.g. ['mcp-context', 'a2a-task']); Group IV uses an object of boolean protocol flags (e.g. {a2a: true, mcp: true, streaming: false}). Both forms are accepted.

oneOf.description: Array form: list of capability label strings (e.g. 'mcp-context', 'a2a-task').

a2a.description: Whether this module supports A2A task delegation.

mcp.description: Whether this module supports MCP context exchange.

streaming.description: Whether this module supports streaming responses.

oneOf.description: Object form: boolean capability flags keyed by protocol name.

url.description: Primary base URL for this module. Used by Group IV modules in place of an endpoints object.

endpoints.description: Per-protocol endpoint URLs. Used by Groups I–III modules.

wellKnown.description: URL path at which this module's agent-card.json is served (e.g. '/.well-known/agent-card.json').

schema.description: Relative workspace path to the primary JSON Schema governing this module's input/output payload (e.g. 'shared/types/memory-item.schema.json').

modalities.description: Input modalities supported by this module (e.g. 'text', 'image', 'audio', 'sensor', 'api-event').

vectorCollection.description: ChromaDB collection name used by this module for vector storage (e.g. 'brain.perception').

neuroanatomy.description: Relative workspace paths to neuroanatomy reference documents relevant to this module.

neuroanatomicalAnalogue.description: Free-text description of the brain structure(s) this module is analogous to (Group IV form).

neuroanatomical-basis.description: Detailed neuroanatomical basis for this module's channel or dispatch implementation (Group III motor-output form).

maps-to-modules.description: Neuroanatomical module names that this implementation maps to (e.g. 'motor-cortex', 'supplementary-motor-area').

skills.description: Enumeration of callable skills exposed by this module.

capabilities.description: Additional capability labels scoped to this specific skill.

a2a.description: A2A protocol configuration block (Group IV form). Contains endpoint URL and task routing declarations.

tasks.description: Inbound and outbound A2A task routing declarations.

inbound.description: Task method names this module accepts.

outbound.description: Task method names this module emits to other modules.

mcp.description: MCP protocol configuration block (Group IV form). Contains endpoint URL and resource declarations.

resources.description: MCP resource URIs exposed by this module (e.g. 'confidence/current').
